testRecordIdStrategydFindLatest
testReflectAutoRegister

acks=all, bootstrap.servers=PLAINTEXT://localhost:32769, connections.max.idle.ms=10000, key.serializer=org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer, testcase.name: testTopicIdStrategyFindLatest
testAvroUnionWithSpecificReader
